overall.description: A smooth aerial camera movement circles the exterior of a large modern stadium with distinctive concrete arches and tensile roofing, resembling the Munich Olympiastadion. The video game footage showcases the architectural details under clear blue skies, transitioning from the front facade around to the rear tent structure and surrounding landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: stadium exterior plaza with concrete paving

agents.ego_description: smoothly approaching the stadium front while maintaining a slight rightward arc around the building

entered.detail: large curved concrete stadium with distinctive roof supports
row of arched glass doorways at ground level
vertical concrete supports beneath the stadium overhang
urban buildings visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide concrete plaza approaching a large modern stadium with distinctive concrete architecture. The camera moves smoothly toward the building, revealing arched glass entrances and vertical support columns under a clear blue sky, with distant office buildings visible on the horizon.

events.description: camera moves from open plaza into the sheltered area beneath the stadium arcade

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the side of the stadium under the concrete overhang and support structures

entered.detail: strip of green grass between the walkway and the building base
angular concrete projections on the upper facade
blue-tinted reflective windows on the stadium upper level

segments.scene_description: Moving into the sheltered zone beneath the stadium overhang, the camera travels along the side facade where angular concrete fins and reflective glass panels become prominent. The space transitions from open sky to partial cover, with a grass verge appearing alongside the concrete walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: close-up view of stadium architectural details

events.description: camera tilts upward to examine the upper concrete facade and window details
camera rounds the building corner revealing the sweeping tensile roof structure

agents.ego_description: examining the architectural details up close before rounding the corner to the rear of the stadium

entered.detail: translucent fabric roof with curved support cables and distinctive tent-like peaks

segments.scene_description: The camera moves close to the building facade, tilting upward to highlight the geometric concrete fins and reflective windows, then rounds the corner to reveal the iconic sweeping tensile roof structure. The transition from the solid concrete arcade to the translucent roof marks a shift in architectural character.

scene_state.functional_zone: open area behind stadium with tensile roof and distant tree line

events.description: camera pulls back to reveal the full scale of the tensile roof against the sky and surrounding landscape

agents.ego_description: circling to the rear to showcase the iconic tent roof and surrounding parkland with distant city views

entered.detail: dense green trees forming the horizon boundary
tall buildings visible in the far distance beyond the trees

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals the rear of the stadium dominated by the sweeping translucent tensile roof against a bright blue sky. The camera moves through an open dirt area with grass verges, revealing a distant tree line and city towers beyond, emphasizing the stadium's integration with the surrounding landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide approach of a modern stadium's concrete facade to a sweeping view of its translucent tensile roof. It begins on a wide concrete plaza, gliding toward arched glass entrances and vertical support columns under a clear blue sky. As the camera moves into the sheltered zone beneath the stadium overhang, the open sky gives way to partial cover, highlighting angular concrete fins and reflective glass panels alongside a grass verge. The perspective then tilts upward to emphasize the geometric architecture before rounding the corner, where the solid concrete arcade shifts into the iconic, sweeping tensile roof structure. Finally, the camera moves through an open dirt area to reveal the rear of the stadium against the bright horizon, integrating the translucent roof with a distant tree line and city towers.
